simple_types.name: CONFIG_WEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_WEN_Field is
   Ren,
   Wen,
   Een)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: ERASEALL_ERASEALL_Field
simple_types.code:
type ERASEALL_ERASEALL_Field is
   Nooperation,
   Erase)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: ERASEUICR_ERASEUICR_Field
simple_types.code:
type ERASEUICR_ERASEUICR_Field is
   Nooperation,
   Erase)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: ICACHECNF_CACHEEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type ICACHECNF_CACHEEN_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: ICACHECNF_CACHEPROFEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type ICACHECNF_CACHEPROFEN_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: READY_READY_Field
simple_types.code:
type READY_READY_Field is
   Busy,
   Ready)
  with Size => 1;

record_types.name: CONFIG_Register
ERASEALL_Register
ERASEUICR_Register
ICACHECNF_Register
NVMC_Peripheral

fields.name: CONFIG
fields.description: Register for erasing all non-volatile user memory

fields.name: ERASEALL
fields.description:
Deprecated register - Register for erasing a page in Code area.
Equivalent to ERASEPAGE.

fields.name: ERASEPCR0
fields.description: Register for erasing User Information Configuration Registers

record_types.name: READY_Register

variables.name: NVMC_Periph
variables.code:
NVMC_Periph : aliased NVMC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => NVMC_Base;
